title: No thrills
description: No thrills modpack with some performance enhancements and QoL fixes. Lightweight for use on potato computers.
body:
# No thrills

Stupid simple modpack with some lightweight performance enhancers, QoL fixes, and minor HUD additions. 

## Why?

This modpack easily enhances your experience with simple performance mods and lightweight QoL enhancements.

## Noteworthy info

- Iris is included, but no shaderpacks are included. This is because shaderpacks are incredibly subjective to what computer you have, and can easily make or break someone's experience.
- WorldEditCUI may become annoying if you have conflicting plugins on a dedicated server
- WorldEdit automatically disables itself when there's WorldEdit installed on a dedicated server.

## What's included?

- [Fabric + Fabric API by the FabricMC team](https://fabricmc.net/)
- [AppleSkin by squeeq502](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin)
- [BetterF3 by TreyRuffy](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3)
- [Iris by coderbot and IMS](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)
- [Litematica by maruohon](https://github.com/maruohon/litematica)
- [Sodium + Lithium by CaffeineMC and contributors](https://github.com/CaffeineMC)
- [Mod Menu by Prospector](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
- [Simple HUD Utilities by johnvictorfs](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-hud-utilities)
- [WorldEdit + WorldEditCUI by EngineHub](https://enginehub.org/)
